  "rating": {{ $json.recommendations.rating}},
  "address": "{{ $json.recommendations.address}}",
  "place_id": "{{ $json.recommendations.place_id}}",
  "price_rating": "{{$json.recommendations.price_rating}}",
  "photo_url": "{{ $json.recommendations.photo_url}}",
  "cuisine_type": "{{ $('Parse Postback Data').first().json.cuisine_type }}"
}
={ "is_liked": true }
